last_hatch.name: Wisp
last_hatch.flavor: The egg trembled for a long moment... then went perfectly still. Just as you turned away — it shattered. A tiny dragon tumbled out and immediately hid behind your boot, peering up with enormous, frightened eyes. A shy dragon. They almost never hatch.

activity_log.event: A new dragon was born from a mystery egg. Ember sniffed the air suspiciously.
Ember was fed. She breathed a tiny flame of satisfaction.
Played with Pebble. Bond strengthened to 85.
Ember collapsed after an exhausting flight. Energy fully depleted.
Pebble sensed the new hatchling and hid under a rock. Shy recognizes shy.
Pebble played hard, then crashed immediately after. Energy depleted.
Pebble was fed. Hunger dropped to 54.
Baby_EmbPeb spotted the new hatchling and immediately tried to wrestle it.
Baby_EmbPeb went absolutely feral during play. Something got knocked over.
Wisp hatched from a mystery egg. Immediately hid behind the nearest boot.
Wisp looked around with wide, frightened eyes. The world is very large.
